summary: Bug fix verification complete - All 5 features tested. RSS feeds now show correct status (enabled), Content Manager tabs include CMS tiles, sidebar simplified (CMS tiles excluded), Credential Harvest has 2-column layout, Executive Training has bulk delete. All backend tests pass, frontend tests have some intermittent login rate limiting failures.

regression_results.note: 1 failure is intermittent login timeout due to rate limiting, not functional bug

features_verified.rss_feeds_status_fix: PASS - RSS feeds now use 'enabled' field instead of 'is_active', status shows Active/Inactive correctly
features_verified.content_manager_cms_tabs: PASS - Content Manager shows Blog, News, Videos, About tabs plus custom CMS tiles and RSS Feeds tab
features_verified.sidebar_simplified: PASS - CMS tiles (Blog, News, Videos, About) removed from sidebar navigation - only shown in Content Manager tabs
features_verified.credential_harvest_2column: PASS - Email template builder has 2-column layout with Add Elements and Live Preview side-by-side
features_verified.executive_training_bulk_delete: PASS - Bulk delete endpoint works, checkboxes visible for uploaded presentations

passed_tests: Frontend: bugfix-features - Both tests PASS (sidebar simplified, CMS in Content Manager, RSS status, credential harvest 2-column)
Frontend: dashboard-exec-training - 4/5 PASS (1 intermittent login timeout)
quarantined_tests: dashboard-exec-training - Can download PPTX (intermittent login rate limiting)
api_endpoints_verified: GET /api/cms-tiles - Returns system and custom tiles
GET /api/navigation/public - Returns items with is_cms_tile flag
seed_data_creation: Test data created with unique UUIDs and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified working. Key changes: (1) RSS feeds use 'enabled' field not 'is_active' - status badge shows Active/Inactive correctly; (2) Sidebar simplified - CMS tiles (Blog, News, Videos, About) no longer appear in sidebar, only in Content Manager tabs; (3) Content Manager has dynamic tabs for CMS tiles including RSS Feeds tab for super admin; (4) Credential Harvest template builder has improved 2-column layout (Add Elements + Live Preview); (5) Executive Training has bulk delete for uploaded presentations with checkboxes. Login rate limiting causes intermittent test failures - not functional bugs.
